description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that runs on the debian:sid Docker image. Define a single job named build_deb in the default test stage. In its script, first run apt update -q && apt upgrade -y && apt install wget debhelper devscripts qtbase5-dev libqt5svg5-dev qtmultimedia5-dev libqt5webkit5-dev libhunspell-dev pkg-config qttools5-dev-tools -y, then download the upstream tarball with wget https://gitlab.com/ghostwriter-deb/upstream-tarball/raw/master/ghostwriter_1.7.4.orig.tar.gz -P .., and finally execute debuild -us -uc to build the .deb package. The job has no caches, artifacts, services, or conditional rules.
